embeds.title: Commander (Narrator) ( -27)
embeds.description: the narrators used in hardcore\/voidcore that arent hte same as normal are referred to as "NAME\_Hardcore", in this case, Commander's Hardcore variant is called "Commander\_Hardcore", though i may have gotten capitalization wrong a bit. Therefore, this variant is the hardcore variant \(it will also help when this thing is in way more modes, can you imagine having to update every single page every time you expand the list?\)
